name: Chicken-Rice Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken pieces in a large pot and cover with water.
2. Add celery, parsley, onion, pepper, bay leaf, and celery seeds to the pot.
3. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 4 hours (or 1 hour on the stove over low heat).
4. Remove chicken pieces from the broth; discard the bay leaf.
5. Chop the chicken into bite-sized pieces.
6. Add rice and carrots to the pot with the remaining broth and cook until the rice is tender, about 30-40 minutes.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
